episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 523: Top SOS Commanders
episode.description:
Your favorite cardboard finance team gets you caught on all the Magic the Gathering card price action of the week, including meta updates, cards to watch and a deep dive on the top SOS Commanders.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
